name: Aksomati
description: The devastating power of the Soma rifle compacted into two elegant pistols.

components.name: Akstiletto
components.description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The devastating power of the Soma rifle compacted into two elegant pistols.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Ivara Prime, Baza Prime, and Aksomati Prime have entered the Prime Vault!

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Aksomati Prime and Baza Prime having the same Riven Disposition as their normal variants despite the UI displaying their correct Disposition of 1.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.4
patchlogs.changes:
Practice stealth as you track your prey, then strike with ruthless precision as Ivara Prime! No hunt is complete without the Baza Prime and Aksomati Prime!
The elegant Aksomati precisely refined to its ultimate manifestation.
You can find Ivara Prime, Baza Prime, and Aksomati Prime Relics in their classic spots (Void, Derelict, Defense, Survival, etc) with the addition of Railjack missions

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.16.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Aksomati firing sound playing when selecting/mousing over the Aksomati in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Aksomati clip not animating while firing.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.10.2
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Aksomati’s reload time from 2.8 to 1.4.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes:
Tenno, complement your Soma with the power of the Aksomati pistols and the razor-sharp Dual Raza hatchets. Get them separately or purchase them with the Soma assault rifle in a discounted bundle!
This bundle features the Soma assault rifle, Dual Raza hatchets and Aksomati pistols. Sharing a unique style, the weapons in this set will inspire awe in your allies and fear in your foes.
The Aksomati and Dual Raza are available for use in Conclave!
